purpose: Obfuscated content injection script that fetches payload from remote C2 server and renders into DOM via innerHTML.

endpoints.purpose: Fetch content from remote C2 server for DOM injection

security.issue: Multi-layer obfuscation (RC4, control flow flattening, opaque predicates) conceals malicious intent
Unsanitized DOM injection via innerHTML enabling XSS
Anti-debugging self-defending: clears console every 4s, detects code beautification
Dynamic code execution via Function('return this')() bypassing CSP
Dead code insertion inflating function bodies

dataFlow: DOM click → debounce(300ms) → construct URL with slugs → fetch remote C2 → JSON parse → forEach encode name + render HTML → innerHTML inject into DOM
entryPoint: IIFE at bottom: addEventListener on DOM element identified by encrypted selector
